availability_zones.description: A list of availability zones where the Neptune DB instance can be deployed.

engine_version.description: The version of the database engine used by the Neptune DB instance.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Neptune DB instance.

instance_class.description: The type of instance class used for the Neptune DB instance.

max_iops_per_db_instance.description: The maximum IOPS (Input/Output Operations Per Second) supported by the DB instance.

max_iops_per_gib.description: The maximum IOPS that can be allocated per GiB of storage.

max_storage_size.description: The maximum storage size, in GiB, that can be allocated to the Neptune DB instance.

min_iops_per_db_instance.description: The minimum IOPS supported by the DB instance.

min_iops_per_gib.description: The minimum IOPS that must be allocated per GiB of storage.

min_storage_size.description: The minimum storage size, in GiB, that can be allocated to the Neptune DB instance.

multi_az_capable.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance supports deployment across multiple availability zones.

read_replica_capable.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance supports read replicas.

storage_type.description: The type of storage used by the Neptune DB instance.

supports_enhanced_monitoring.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance supports enhanced monitoring.

supports_iam_database_authentication.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance supports IAM database authentication.

supports_iops.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance supports provisioned IOPS.

supports_performance_insights.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance supports performance insights.

supports_storage_encryption.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance supports storage encryption.

vpc.description: Indicates if the Neptune DB instance is in a VPC (Virtual Private Cloud).
